leadershipForm.title: Neman Shugabanci
leadershipForm.pageSubtitle: Taimaka wajen faɗaɗa cibiyar sadarwar al’ummar Tariq Islam ta duniya a yankinka
leadershipForm.successDesc: Mun gode da sha’awarka na zama jagoran al’umma. Za mu duba aikace-aikacenka kuma mu dawo maka da amsa nan ba da jimawa ba.

placeholders.experience: Ka bayyana ƙwarewarka a shugabanci na al’umma, kungiyoyin Musulunci ko aikin sa-kai...
placeholders.motivation: Me ya sa kake son zama jagoran al’umma? Me ke motsa ka wajen gina al’ummar Musulmi ta duniya?
placeholders.availability: Ka bayyana lokutan da kake da su da kuma lokacin da za ka iya bayarwa ga ayyukan shugabanci...

toasts.authRequiredDesc: Da fatan ka shiga kafin ka aika aikace-aikacen.
toasts.submissionFailedDesc: An sami matsala wajen aikawa. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.

validation.fullNameMin: Cikakken suna ya zama aƙalla haruffa 2
validation.availabilityMin: Bayyana lokacin da kake da shi

errors.takingTooLong: Dashboard yana ɗaukar lokaci mai tsawo wajen lodawa.
